<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <RelativeLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/main_color">
<ScrollView android:id="@+id/scrollView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_above="@+id/logoutBtn" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<!-- Header --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingTop="32dp" android:paddingBottom="28dp" android:gravity="center">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="" android:textSize="48sp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Quản Trị Hệ Thống" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="26sp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Đặt vé xem phim" android:textColor="#AAAAAA" android:textSize="14sp" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Divider --> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:background="#3A3F5C" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" />
<!-- Card Movies --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardMovies" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#2D3253" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="6dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="20dp" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="56dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:text="" android:textSize="28sp" android:gravity="center" android:background="#3A4075" android:padding="8dp" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginStart="16dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Quản lý Phim" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="17sp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Thêm, sửa, xóa phim" android:textColor="#AAAAAA" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="›" android:textColor="@color/orange" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Card Rooms --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardRooms" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#2D3253" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="6dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="20dp" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="56dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:text="️" android:textSize="28sp" android:gravity="center" android:background="#3A4075" android:padding="8dp" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginStart="16dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Quản lý Phòng Chiếu" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="17sp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Cấu hình sơ đồ ghế" android:textColor="#AAAAAA" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="›" android:textColor="@color/orange" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Card Showtimes --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardShowtimes" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#2D3253" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="6dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="20dp" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="56dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:text="" android:textSize="28sp" android:gravity="center" android:background="#3A4075" android:padding="8dp" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginStart="16dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Quản lý Suất Chiếu" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="17sp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Lịch chiếu và khung giờ" android:textColor="#AAAAAA" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="›" android:textColor="@color/orange" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Card Tickets --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardTickets" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#2D3253" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="6dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="20dp" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="56dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:text="️" android:textSize="28sp" android:gravity="center" android:background="#3A4075" android:padding="8dp" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginStart="16dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Quản lý Vé" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="17sp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Xem và hủy vé đã đặt" android:textColor="#AAAAAA" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="›" android:textColor="@color/orange" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Logout Button --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/logoutBtn" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="20dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackground" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:layout_marginTop="24dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="28dp" android:layout_height="28dp" android:src="@drawable/btn_1" android:contentDescription="Logout" android:tint="@android:color/white" />
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Logout" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

<!-- Logout Button (Floating at bottom left) --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/logoutBtn" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_alignParentBottom="true" android:layout_alignParentStart="true" android:layout_marginStart="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:paddingVertical="12dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">

option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/black" tools:context=".ui.view.DetailMovieActivity">
<ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content">
<!-- Poster Image Container with overlay --> <FrameLayout android:id="@+id/posterContainer" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="380dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<!-- Poster Image --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/ivPoster" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:scaleType="centerCrop" tools:srcCompat="@tools:sample/avatars" />
<!-- Dark gradient overlay --> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/gradient_overlay" />
<!-- Back Button --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/btnBack" android:layout_width="44dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:layout_margin="14dp" android:contentDescription="Back" android:padding="8dp" android:background="@drawable/rounded_button_semi_black" android:tint="@color/white" app:srcCompat="@drawable/back_dark" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" />
</FrameLayout>
<!-- Movie Title and Controls Container --> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:id="@+id/titleContainer" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="18dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/posterContainer">
<!-- Movie Title --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvMovieTitle" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="The Gorge" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="38sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:maxLines="2" android:ellipsize="end" android:letterSpacing="0.02" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@+id/guidelineBookmark" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
<!-- Bookmark icon --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/btnBookmark" android:layout_width="26dp" android:layout_height="26dp" android:contentDescription="Bookmark" android:tint="@color/white" android:scaleType="centerInside" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@+id/btnShare" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@+id/tvMovieTitle" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@+id/guidelineBookmark" app:srcCompat="@drawable/back_dark" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" />
<!-- Share icon --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/btnShare" android:layout_width="26dp" android:layout_height="26dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:contentDescription="Share" android:tint="@color/white" android:scaleType="centerInside" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@+id/tvMovieTitle" app:srcCompat="@drawable/back_dark" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" />
<!-- Guideline for spacing --> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.Guideline android:id="@+id/guidelineBookmark" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintGuide_percent="0.75" />
<!-- Genres RecyclerView --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvGenres" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" app:layoutManager="androidx.recyclerview.widget.LinearLayoutManager" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/tvMovieTitle" tools:listitem="@layout/item_genre" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<!-- Info Row: Year/Duration and IMDb Rating --> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:id="@+id/infoRow" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/titleContainer">
<!-- Year and Duration --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvYearDuration" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="2025 - 1h 55m" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="11sp" android:alpha="0.75" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
<!-- IMDb Rating --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvImdbRating" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="IMDb 6" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="11sp" android:alpha="0.75" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<!-- Divider Line --> <View android:id="@+id/divider1" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:background="#33FFFFFF" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/infoRow" />
<!-- Summary Section --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/summarySection" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/divider1">
<!-- Summary Title --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvSummaryLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Summary" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="15sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp" />
<!-- Movie Description --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvDescription" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Two operatives are appointed to posts in guard stations above and below an enormous chasm." android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="12.5sp" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.5" android:alpha="0.82" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Divider Line 2 --> <View android:id="@+id/divider2" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:background="#33FFFFFF" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/summarySection" />
<!-- Casts Section --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/castsSection" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/divider2">
<!-- Casts Title --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvCastsLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Casts" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="15sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" />
<!-- Casts RecyclerView --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvCasts" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" app:layoutManager="androidx.recyclerview.widget.LinearLayoutManager" tools:listitem="@layout/item_cast" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Buy Ticket Button --> <Button android:id="@+id/btnBuyTicket" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="54dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="26dp" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:text="Buy Ticket" android:textColor="#000000" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:background="@drawable/rounded_button_green" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/castsSection" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout> </ScrollView> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#0F1419" tools:context=".ui.view.MainActivity" >
<ScrollView android:id="@+id/scrollView2" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingBottom="100dp" android:orientation="vertical">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp"
android:layout_marginTop="28dp">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/imageView2" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:srcCompat="@drawable/profile" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textView" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="Hello Đỗ Lam" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="19sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@+id/imageView2" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textView2" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp" android:text="hahahaha" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@+id/imageView2" /> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<EditText android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="16dp" android:background="@drawable/light_black_bg" android:drawableStart="@drawable/search" android:drawableEnd="@drawable/microphone" android:drawablePadding="8dp" android:ems="10" android:inputType="text" android:padding="12dp" android:text="Tên film" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textColorHint="@color/white" />
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:minHeight="200dp">
<androidx.viewpager2.widget.ViewPager2 android:id="@+id/viewPager2" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintHorizontal_bias="0.0" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintVertical_bias="0.0" />
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/progressBarSlider" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@+id/viewPager2" /> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="16dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="horizontal">
<!-- Thêm các view ở đây -->
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Top Movies" android:textColor="@color/orange" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/sellAllTopMovies" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="See All" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/recyclerViewTopMovies" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/progressTopMovies" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@+id/recyclerViewTopMovies" /> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="16dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="horizontal">
<!-- Thêm các view ở đây -->
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Upcoming Movies" android:textColor="@color/orange" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/sellAllUpcomingMovies" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="See All" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:minHeight="220dp">
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/recyclerViewUpcomingMovies" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/progressUpcomingMovies" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@+id/recyclerViewUpcomingMovies" /> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>
<com.ismaeldivita.chipnavigation.ChipNavigationBar android:id="@+id/chipNavigation" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="70dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="32dp" android:background="@drawable/light_black_bg" android:padding="4dp" app:cnb_iconColor="@color/white" app:cnb_iconSize="20dp" app:cnb_menuResource="@menu/bottom_menu" app:cnb_orientationMode="horizontal" app:cnb_radius="10dp" app:cnb_unselectedColor="@color/white" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@+id/scrollView2" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" /> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

<TextView android:id="@+id/textView" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="Hello Đỗ Lam" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="19sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@+id/imageView2" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textView2" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp" android:text="hahahaha" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@+id/imageView2" /> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<EditText android:id="@+id/searchEditText" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="16dp" android:background="@drawable/light_black_bg" android:drawableStart="@drawable/search" android:drawableEnd="@drawable/microphone" android:drawablePadding="8dp" android:ems="10" android:inputType="text" android:padding="12dp" android:text="Tên film" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textColorHint="@color/white" />
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:minHeight="200dp">
<androidx.viewpager2.widget.ViewPager2 android:id="@+id/viewPager2" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintHorizontal_bias="0.0" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintVertical_bias="0.0" />
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/progressBarSlider" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@+id/viewPager2" /> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="16dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="horizontal">
<!-- Thêm các view ở đây -->
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Top Movies" android:textColor="@color/orange" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/sellAllTopMovies" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="See All" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/recyclerViewTopMovies" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/progressTopMovies" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@+id/recyclerViewTopMovies" /> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="16dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="horizontal">
<!-- Thêm các view ở đây -->
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Upcoming Movies" android:textColor="@color/orange" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/sellAllUpcomingMovies" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="See All" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:minHeight="220dp">
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/recyclerViewUpcomingMovies" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/progressUpcomingMovies" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@+id/recyclerViewUpcomingMovies" /> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>
<com.ismaeldivita.chipnavigation.ChipNavigationBar android:id="@+id/chipNavigation" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="70dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="32dp" android:background="@drawable/light_black_bg" android:padding="4dp" app:cnb_iconColor="@color/white" app:cnb_iconSize="20dp" app:cnb_menuResource="@menu/bottom_menu" app:cnb_orientationMode="horizontal" app:cnb_radius="10dp" app:cnb_unselectedColor="@color/white" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@+id/scrollView2" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" /> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <RelativeLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/black">
<!-- ScrollView for content --> <ScrollView android:id="@+id/scrollView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_below="@+id/header" android:layout_above="@+id/logoutBtn" android:paddingBottom="16dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<!-- Avatar Container --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:layout_marginBottom="32dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="120dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:src="@drawable/profile" android:contentDescription="Avatar" android:scaleType="fitCenter" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/userNameText" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Nguyễn Văn A" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:gravity="center" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/userEmailText" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="user@example.com" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@android:color/darker_gray" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:gravity="center" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Divider --> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:background="@android:color/darker_gray" android:layout_marginVertical="24dp" />
<!-- Menu Items --> <!-- Cập nhật thông tin --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/updateInfoBtn" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackground" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/btn_2" android:contentDescription="Update Info" android:tint="@android:color/holo_blue_light" />
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Cập nhật thông tin" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" />
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/btn_1" android:contentDescription="Arrow" android:tint="@android:color/darker_gray" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Đổi mật khẩu --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/changePasswordBtn" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackground" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:layout_marginTop="8dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/btn_3" android:contentDescription="Change Password" android:tint="@android:color/holo_green_dark" />
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Đổi mật khẩu" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" />
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/btn_1" android:contentDescription="Arrow" android:tint="@android:color/darker_gray" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>
<!-- Logout Button (Floating at bottom left) --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/logoutBtn" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_alignParentBottom="true" android:layout_alignParentStart="true" android:layout_marginStart="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:paddingVertical="12dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/btn_1" android:contentDescription="Logout" android:tint="@android:color/white" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Logout" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" /> </LinearLayout>
</RelativeLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <RelativeLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/black">
<!-- Header with Back Button --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/header" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_alignParentTop="true">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/backBtn" android:layout_width="32dp" android:layout_height="32dp" android:src="@drawable/btn_1" android:contentDescription="Back" android:tint="@android:color/white" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" />
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Hồ Sơ" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- ScrollView for content --> <ScrollView android:id="@+id/scrollView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_below="@+id/header" android:layout_above="@+id/logoutBtn" android:paddingBottom="16dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<!-- Avatar Container --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:layout_marginBottom="32dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="120dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:src="@drawable/profile" android:contentDescription="Avatar" android:scaleType="fitCenter" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/userNameText" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Nguyễn Văn A" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:gravity="center" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/userEmailText" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="user@example.com" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@android:color/darker_gray" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:gravity="center" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Divider --> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:background="@android:color/darker_gray" android:layout_marginVertical="24dp" />
<!-- Menu Items --> <!-- Cập nhật thông tin --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/updateInfoBtn" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackground" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/btn_2" android:contentDescription="Update Info" android:tint="@android:color/holo_blue_light" />
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Cập nhật thông tin" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" />
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/btn_1" android:contentDescription="Arrow" android:tint="@android:color/darker_gray" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Đổi mật khẩu --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/changePasswordBtn" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackground" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:layout_marginTop="8dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/btn_3" android:contentDescription="Change Password" android:tint="@android:color/holo_green_dark" />
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Đổi mật khẩu" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" />
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/btn_1" android:contentDescription="Arrow" android:tint="@android:color/darker_gray" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>
<!-- Logout Button (Floating at bottom left) --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/logoutBtn" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_alignParentBottom="true" android:layout_alignParentStart="true" android:layout_marginStart="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:paddingVertical="12dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/btn_1" android:contentDescription="Logout" android:tint="@android:color/white" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Logout" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" /> </LinearLayout>
</RelativeLayout>

option.name: filePath
option.value: /activity_seat_list (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/black" tools:context=".ui.view.client.SeatListActivity">
<ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" >
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="25dp" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/backBtn" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:srcCompat="@drawable/back_2" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textView3" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Select Seat" android:textSize="19sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" tools:layout_editor_absoluteY="10dp" /> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:id="@+id/dateRecyclerView" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingEnd="8dp" android:layout_marginVertical="8dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" /> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:id="@+id/timeRecyclerView" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingEnd="8dp" android:layout_marginVertical="8dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" />
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/imageView4" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:srcCompat="@drawable/cinema" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/seatRecylerView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_marginStart="48dp" android:layout_marginTop="48dp" android:layout_marginEnd="48dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" /> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginStart="48dp" android:layout_marginEnd="48dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:orientation="horizontal"> <View android:layout_width="10dp" android:layout_height="10dp" android:background="@drawable/ic_seat_available" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="12sp" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:text="Available" /> <View android:layout_width="10dp" android:layout_height="10dp" android:background="@drawable/ic_seat_selected" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="12sp" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:text="Selected" /> <View android:id="@+id/view" android:layout_width="10dp" android:layout_height="10dp" android:background="@drawable/ic_seat_unavailable" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="12sp" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:text="Unavaible" /> </LinearLayout>
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="3dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/priceTxt" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="$0" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="25sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatButton android:id="@+id/button" android:layout_width="200dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginVertical="8dp" android:background="@drawable/green_bg" android:text="Download Ticket" android:textColor="@color/white" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/numberSelectedTxt" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0 Seat Selected" android:textColor="@color/grey" android:textStyle="bold"
app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" /> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout> </LinearLayout> </ScrollView> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/black" tools:context=".ui.view.client.SeatListActivity">
<ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" >
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="25dp" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/backBtn" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:srcCompat="@drawable/back_2" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textView3" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Select Seat" android:textSize="19sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" tools:layout_editor_absoluteY="10dp" /> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:id="@+id/dateRecyclerView" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingEnd="8dp" android:layout_marginVertical="8dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" /> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:id="@+id/timeRecyclerView" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingEnd="8dp" android:layout_marginVertical="8dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" />
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/imageView4" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:srcCompat="@drawable/cinema" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/seatRecylerView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_marginStart="48dp" android:layout_marginTop="48dp" android:layout_marginEnd="48dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" /> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginStart="48dp" android:layout_marginEnd="48dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:orientation="horizontal"> <View android:layout_width="10dp" android:layout_height="10dp" android:background="@drawable/ic_seat_available" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="12sp" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:text="Available" /> <View android:layout_width="10dp" android:layout_height="10dp" android:background="@drawable/ic_seat_selected" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="12sp" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:text="Selected" /> <View android:id="@+id/view" android:layout_width="10dp" android:layout_height="10dp" android:background="@drawable/ic_seat_unavailable" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="12sp" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:text="Unavaible" /> </LinearLayout>
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/numberSelectedTxt" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0 Ghế Được Chọn" android:textColor="@color/grey" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/priceTxt" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Giá: 100.000 đ" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/numberSelectedTxt" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" />
<androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatButton android:id="@+id/btnBooking" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginVertical="8dp" android:background="@drawable/green_bg" android:text="Tải Vé" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/priceTxt" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout> </LinearLayout> </ScrollView> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="8dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/admin_surface" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="4dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<!-- Row 1: Ticket ID and Status --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTicketId" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Vé #ABC123" android:textColor="@color/admin_text_primary" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="16sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Đã thanh toán" android:textColor="@color/admin_success" android:textSize="13sp" android:paddingHorizontal="8dp" android:paddingVertical="4dp" android:background="@drawable/admin_chip_neutral" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Divider --> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:background="@color/admin_border" android:layout_marginVertical="8dp" />
<!-- Row 2: Booking Time --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvBookingTime" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Đặt lúc: 14/04/2025 19:30" android:textColor="@color/admin_text_secondary" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<!-- Row 3: Seats --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvSeats" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Ghế: A1, A2, A3" android:textColor="@color/admin_text_secondary" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<!-- Row 4: Total Price --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvTotalPrice" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Tổng: 300.000đ" android:textColor="@color/admin_warning" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="14sp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" />
<!-- Button Cancel --> <Button android:id="@+id/btnCancel" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="40dp" android:text="Hủy Vé" android:textColor="@color/admin_text_primary" android:textStyle="bold" android:background="@drawable/admin_button_danger" android:textSize="14sp" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button" />
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>

<!-- Row 1: Bill ID and Status --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp">

<!-- Divider --> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:background="@color/admin_border" android:layout_marginVertical="8dp" />
<!-- Row 2: Booking Time --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvBookingTime" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Đặt lúc: 14/04/2025 19:30" android:textColor="@color/admin_text_secondary" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<!-- Row 3: Seats --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvSeats" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Ghế: A1, A2, A3" android:textColor="@color/admin_text_secondary" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<!-- Row 4: Total Price --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvTotalPrice" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Tổng: 300.000đ" android:textColor="@color/admin_warning" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="14sp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" />
<!-- Button Cancel --> <Button android:id="@+id/btnCancel" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="40dp" android:text="Hủy Vé" android:textColor="@color/admin_text_primary" android:textStyle="bold" android:background="@drawable/admin_button_danger" android:textSize="14sp" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button" />
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>

android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Role: User" android:textColor="@color/orange" android:textSize="12sp" /> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvMoney" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Money: 0" android:textColor="#88DD88" android:textSize="12sp" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> <ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnEdit" android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_edit" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:tint="@color/orange" /> <ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnDelete" android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_close_clear_cancel" <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:background="#2D3253" android:layout_margin="8dp" android:padding="12dp" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<!-- Avatar --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/ivUserAvatar" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:src="@drawable/btn_1" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:contentDescription="Avatar" android:background="#3A4075" android:layout_marginEnd="12dp" />
<!-- Info --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvFullName" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Full Name" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="16sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvEmail" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="user@email.com" android:textColor="#AAAAAA" android:textSize="12sp" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="4dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvRole" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Role: User" android:textColor="@color/orange" android:textSize="11sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMoney" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Money: 0" android:textColor="#88DD88" android:textSize="11sp" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Buttons --> <ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnEdit" android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_edit" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:tint="@color/orange" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" />
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnDelete" android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_close_clear_cancel" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:tint="#FF6B6B" /> </LinearLayout>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_margin="8dp">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivCastImage" android:layout_width="90dp" android:layout_height="90dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:contentDescription="Cast Image" android:background="@drawable/rounded_button_blue" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCastName" android:layout_width="90dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Actor Name" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="11sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textAlignment="center" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:ellipsize="end" android:maxLines="2" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.1" />
</LinearLayout>

<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivCastImage" android:layout_width="95dp" android:layout_height="95dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:contentDescription="Cast Image" android:background="@drawable/circular_image_bg" />

</LinearLayout>
